contextBlurb: Wyoming is the only U.S. state to explicitly authorize government issuance of a stablecoin. The Wyoming Stable Token Act (2023) created the Wyoming Stable Token Commission to issue WYST, a USD-backed stable token with reserves held in U.S. government securities.

legislation.title: Wyoming Stable Token Act
legislation.summary: Establishes the Wyoming Stable Token Commission and authorizes the issuance of WYST, a USD-backed stable token. Reserves are held 1:1 in U.S. government securities or cash equivalents. The only U.S. state law explicitly authorizing government issuance of a stablecoin.
